languages.text: "Штрафники хорошо понимают, что Бог-Император даровал им лишь один шанс на искупление. Менее смышленным я даровал расстрел. Даже Яруб Вукчик, сержант, чей перечень дисциплинарных проступков ранее был весьма обширен, отучился тянуть руки к казенному имуществу. Стоит пропасть хотя бы одной палочке лхо — и его ждет либо карцер, либо расстрел, в зависимости от текущих потерь и нужд полка".

traits.locale_text: "Штрафники хорошо понимают, что Бог-Император даровал им лишь один шанс на искупление. Менее смышленным я даровал расстрел. Даже Яруб Вукчик, сержант, чей перечень дисциплинарных проступков ранее был весьма обширен, отучился тянуть руки к казенному имуществу. Стоит пропасть хотя бы одной палочке лхо — и его ждет либо карцер, либо расстрел, в зависимости от текущих потерь и нужд полка".

languages.text: "The soldiers are fully aware that the God-Emperor has granted them one last chance at redemption. Anyone who fails to wise up to this fact gets shot. Even Jarub Vukchik, a sergeant whose record of disciplinary infractions used to be extensive, now knows better than to steal the regiment's property. If so much as a lho-stick goes missing, he'll be put in a cell or in front of a firing squad, depending on the regiment's current losses and needs."
languages.original_text: "Штрафники хорошо понимают, что Бог-Император даровал им лишь один шанс на искупление. Менее смышленным я даровал расстрел. Даже Яруб Вукчик, сержант, чей перечень дисциплинарных проступков ранее был весьма обширен, отучился тянуть руки к казенному имуществу. Стоит пропасть хотя бы одной палочке лхо — и его ждет либо карцер, либо расстрел, в зависимости от текущих потерь и нужд полка".

Even Jarub Vukchik, a sergeant whose record of disciplinary infractions used to be extensive, now knows better than to steal the regiment's property. If so much as a lho-stick goes missing, he'll be put in a cell or in front of a firing squad, depending on the regiment's current losses and needs."

"The soldiers are fully aware that the God-Emperor has granted them one last chance at redemption. Anyone who fails to wise up to this fact gets shot. Even Jarub Vukchik, a sergeant whose record of disciplinary infractions used to be extensive, now knows better than to steal the regiment's property. "Jarub Vukchik, a sergeant. His record of disciplinary infractions has long since surpassed all reasonable limits. His next offence will put him in a cell or in front of a firing squad, depending on the severity of the misdeed."

If so much as a lho-stick goes missing, he'll be put in a cell or in front of a firing squad, depending on the regiment's current losses and needs."

"The soldiers are fully aware that the God-Emperor has granted them one last chance at redemption. Anyone who fails to wise up to this fact gets shot. Even Jarub Vukchik, a sergeant whose record of disciplinary infractions used to be extensive, now knows better than to steal the regiment's property. If so much as a lho-stick goes missing, he'll be put in a cell or in front of a firing squad, depending on the regiment's current losses and needs."

languages.text: «Los soldados son plenamente conscientes de que el Dios Emperador les ha otorgado una última oportunidad de redención. Todo el que no se da cuenta de esto acaba ejecutado. Incluso Jarub Vukchik, un sargento con un impresionante registro de infracciones disciplinarias, sabe ya que le interesa robar la propiedad del regimiento. Como desaparezca un solo cigarrillo de lho, sabe que le esperan o la celda o el escuadrón de fusilamiento, según las pérdidas y necesidades del regimiento en ese momento».
languages.original_text: "The soldiers are fully aware that the God-Emperor has granted them one last chance at redemption. Anyone who fails to wise up to this fact gets shot. Even Jarub Vukchik, a sergeant whose record of disciplinary infractions used to be extensive, now knows better than to steal the regiment's property. If so much as a lho-stick goes missing, he'll be put in a cell or in front of a firing squad, depending on the regiment's current losses and needs."

traits.locale_text: «Los soldados son plenamente conscientes de que el Dios Emperador les ha otorgado una última oportunidad de redención. Todo el que no se da cuenta de esto acaba ejecutado. Incluso Jarub Vukchik, un sargento con un impresionante registro de infracciones disciplinarias, sabe ya que le interesa robar la propiedad del regimiento. Como desaparezca un solo cigarrillo de lho, sabe que le esperan o la celda o el escuadrón de fusilamiento, según las pérdidas y necesidades del regimiento en ese momento».

languages.text: “士兵们都很清楚，神皇给了他们最后一次赎罪的机会。谁要是认不清这一点，就会被拉去枪毙。就连以前有一长串违纪记录的雅鲁布·武克奇克军士，如今也知道不能再偷军团的财产了。哪怕只是丢了一根麻烟，他都会被关禁闭，或者被送到行刑队。至于是哪一种，取决于团里当前的人员损耗与战术需求。”
languages.original_text: "The soldiers are fully aware that the God-Emperor has granted them one last chance at redemption. Anyone who fails to wise up to this fact gets shot. Even Jarub Vukchik, a sergeant whose record of disciplinary infractions used to be extensive, now knows better than to steal the regiment's property. If so much as a lho-stick goes missing, he'll be put in a cell or in front of a firing squad, depending on the regiment's current losses and needs."

traits.locale_text: “士兵们都很清楚，神皇给了他们最后一次赎罪的机会。谁要是认不清这一点，就会被拉去枪毙。就连以前有一长串违纪记录的雅鲁布·武克奇克军士，如今也知道不能再偷军团的财产了。哪怕只是丢了一根麻烟，他都会被关禁闭，或者被送到行刑队。至于是哪一种，取决于团里当前的人员损耗与战术需求。”

languages.text: « Les soldats ont bien conscience que l'Empereur-Dieu leur a accordé une ultime chance de rédemption. Si le moindre d'entre eux l'oublie, il sera fusillé sur-le-champ. Même Jarub Vukchik, un sergent qui n'était pourtant pas le dernier en termes de sanctions disciplinaires, sait désormais se retenir de voler la propriété du régiment. Il sait qu'au premier cigalho manquant, il se retrouvera en cellule ou face à un peloton d'exécution, selon les pertes et les besoins actuels des troupes. »
languages.original_text: "The soldiers are fully aware that the God-Emperor has granted them one last chance at redemption. Anyone who fails to wise up to this fact gets shot. Even Jarub Vukchik, a sergeant whose record of disciplinary infractions used to be extensive, now knows better than to steal the regiment's property. If so much as a lho-stick goes missing, he'll be put in a cell or in front of a firing squad, depending on the regiment's current losses and needs."

traits.locale_text: « Les soldats ont bien conscience que l'Empereur-Dieu leur a accordé une ultime chance de rédemption. Si le moindre d'entre eux l'oublie, il sera fusillé sur-le-champ. Même Jarub Vukchik, un sergent qui n'était pourtant pas le dernier en termes de sanctions disciplinaires, sait désormais se retenir de voler la propriété du régiment. Il sait qu'au premier cigalho manquant, il se retrouvera en cellule ou face à un peloton d'exécution, selon les pertes et les besoins actuels des troupes. »

languages.text: "Askerler, Tanrı İmparator'un onlara kurtuluş için son bir şans bahşettiğinin tamamen farkında. Bu gerçeği kavramakta başarısız olan herkes vurulur. Disiplin ihlal sicili eskiden kabarık olan çavuş Jarub Vukchik bile artık alayın malını çalmaması gerektiğini biliyor. Eğer bir liho dalı bile kaybolursa alayın mevcut kayıplarına ve ihtiyaçlarına bağlı olarak ya hücreye atılır ya da idam mangasının önüne çıkarılır."
languages.original_text: "The soldiers are fully aware that the God-Emperor has granted them one last chance at redemption. Anyone who fails to wise up to this fact gets shot. Even Jarub Vukchik, a sergeant whose record of disciplinary infractions used to be extensive, now knows better than to steal the regiment's property. If so much as a lho-stick goes missing, he'll be put in a cell or in front of a firing squad, depending on the regiment's current losses and needs."

traits.locale_text: "Askerler, Tanrı İmparator'un onlara kurtuluş için son bir şans bahşettiğinin tamamen farkında. Bu gerçeği kavramakta başarısız olan herkes vurulur. Disiplin ihlal sicili eskiden kabarık olan çavuş Jarub Vukchik bile artık alayın malını çalmaması gerektiğini biliyor. Eğer bir liho dalı bile kaybolursa alayın mevcut kayıplarına ve ihtiyaçlarına bağlı olarak ya hücreye atılır ya da idam mangasının önüne çıkarılır."

languages.text: "Die Soldaten sind sich bewusst, dass ihnen der Gottimperator eine letzte Chance auf Wiedergutmachung gewährt hat. Wer das nicht erkennt, wird erschossen. Selbst Jarub Vukchik, ein Sergeant mit einer langen Liste von Disziplinlosigkeiten, weiß jetzt, dass es keine gute Idee ist, Eigentum des Regiments zu stehlen. Sobald auch nur ein Lho-Stab fehlt, endet abhängig von den aktuellen Verlusten und Bedürfnissen des Regiments er in einer Zelle oder vor einem Erschießungskommando."
languages.original_text: "The soldiers are fully aware that the God-Emperor has granted them one last chance at redemption. Anyone who fails to wise up to this fact gets shot. Even Jarub Vukchik, a sergeant whose record of disciplinary infractions used to be extensive, now knows better than to steal the regiment's property. If so much as a lho-stick goes missing, he'll be put in a cell or in front of a firing squad, depending on the regiment's current losses and needs."

traits.locale_text: "Die Soldaten sind sich bewusst, dass ihnen der Gottimperator eine letzte Chance auf Wiedergutmachung gewährt hat. Wer das nicht erkennt, wird erschossen. Selbst Jarub Vukchik, ein Sergeant mit einer langen Liste von Disziplinlosigkeiten, weiß jetzt, dass es keine gute Idee ist, Eigentum des Regiments zu stehlen. Sobald auch nur ein Lho-Stab fehlt, endet abhängig von den aktuellen Verlusten und Bedürfnissen des Regiments er in einer Zelle oder vor einem Erschießungskommando."

languages.text: 「兵士たちは、神皇帝が彼らに最後の贖罪の機会を与えたことを十分に理解している。この事実を理解しない者は銃殺される。かつては懲戒処分歴が長かった中尉のジャラブ・ヴチキも、連隊の財産を盗むことはもうしない。たとえロ・スティックが1本もなくなっても、連隊の損失と必要性によって、彼は拘束されたり銃殺隊の前に立たされるだろう。」
languages.original_text: "The soldiers are fully aware that the God-Emperor has granted them one last chance at redemption. Anyone who fails to wise up to this fact gets shot. Even Jarub Vukchik, a sergeant whose record of disciplinary infractions used to be extensive, now knows better than to steal the regiment's property. If so much as a lho-stick goes missing, he'll be put in a cell or in front of a firing squad, depending on the regiment's current losses and needs."

traits.locale_text: 「兵士たちは、神皇帝が彼らに最後の贖罪の機会を与えたことを十分に理解している。この事実を理解しない者は銃殺される。かつては懲戒処分歴が長かった中尉のジャラブ・ヴチキも、連隊の財産を盗むことはもうしない。たとえロ・スティックが1本もなくなっても、連隊の損失と必要性によって、彼は拘束されたり銃殺隊の前に立たされるだろう。」
